Title: How Turbo Pascal made coding instant
Author: GitHub
Description:
"No one likes waiting." Anders Hejlsberg explains the frustration of early computing where compiling code could take all afternoon. In this clip, he reveals how Turbo Pascal solved this by compiling directly into memory, bypassing the disk entirely to create an instant feedback loop for developers.

#AndersHejlsberg #TurboPascal #Compiler
